aweme_list.desc: Have you spotted someone flashing their neon card around yet? 😎 Our disco pink, juicy green and sunshine yellow cards are only available for the summer (or until stocks last). AD | Build money skills for your kids with the @monzo Under 16’s account. Kids can get their own card and app set up for them to track spending and saving habits. As it’s linked to your account, you can keep track with live notifications and if you need to, control spending limits. #monzo #U16 #MonzoU16 Interest paid monthly. £10,000 maximum in savings per child. Ages 6-15. Parent/Guardian account needed. UK residents only. Ts&Cs apply.
